commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR wires bounded lane-release callbacks into plugin-owned Codex app-server attempts and adds regression coverage for releasing a same-session lane after an ignored Codex timeout.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +60. Total +62 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main suppresses lane-release hooks for plugin-owned harnesses, and the PR regression models a Codex timeout that never settles followed by a second same-session run.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; the clean automerge path should wait for exact-head checks and the existing merge-risk decision.

target.title: fix(codex): release timed-out app-server lanes
target.body:
Makes https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94685 merge-ready for the ClawSweeper automerge loop.
The edit pass should inspect the live PR diff, review comments, and failing checks; rebase if needed; keep the contributor branch credited; and stop only when validation is green or an external blocker is proven.
Known failing checks:
- Failing check: checks-node-core-tooling:FAILURE (https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27802593880/job/82275891543)

## Source
Replacement for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94685 because the source branch could not be updated.

Inherited issue-closing references from the source PR:
Fixes #84569

Original contributor: @hannesrudolph.
target.author: app/clawsweeper
